# Third-Party Notices

This project vendors and/or redistributes third-party components. The following notices apply.

## Ghostty

Termini ships Ghostty's runtime as `GhosttyKit.xcframework`, either from
the repo's GitHub release artifact or from a local development override under
`vendor/ghostty/macos`.

Ghostty is licensed under the MIT License.
Copyright and license text for Ghostty should be included here.

> Note: Paste Ghostty’s LICENSE content below verbatim.
